The **Municipal Chamber of Rio de Janeiro** ([Portuguese](/wiki/Portuguese_language "Portuguese language"): *Câmara Municipal do Rio de Janeiro*) is the [unicameral](/wiki/Unicameralism "Unicameralism") legislative body of the city of [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"). It was founded in 1565 by the Portuguese colonists.
